Text.Page: Whatever the Free Brotherhood was once, they're homicidal maniacs now—{@LinkCreature:19#4000#Lokian ragers} and {@LinkCreature:19#4003#gutreavers} and {@LinkCreature:19#4006#bloodweavers}, not people. I think someone needs to hunt them down and kill them.
They're a menace to everyone, and I'm not sorry they're dead.
